title: achillea santolinoides subsp. wilhelmsii
intro: Achillea santolinoides subsp. wilhelmsii is a subspecies of the Yarrow plant, a perennial herb belonging to the Asteraceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and relieving menstrual cramps, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Achillea santolinoides subsp. wilhelmsii can be prepared in various forms, including teas, infusions, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
